sys_hub_flow.description: Sends a confirmation email to the consumer after a Return Request is submitted, then updates status to Shipping Label Sent.
sys_hub_flow.name: CircleBack Return Confirmation Email

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Table Name
sys_hub_flow_input.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_673439d8393f453285f27f03008bc530

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Record
sys_hub_flow_input.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_673439d8393f453285f27f03008bc530

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Send return confirmation email to consumer
Update Return Request status to Shipping Label Sent
Wait 30 seconds before sending confirmation email

sys_hub_flow_snapshot.description: Sends a confirmation email to the consumer after a Return Request is submitted, then updates status to Shipping Label Sent.
sys_hub_flow_snapshot.name: CircleBack Return Confirmation Email

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Record

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Update Return Request status to Shipping Label Sent
Wait 30 seconds before sending confirmation email
Send return confirmation email to consumer
